description_cn: 使以点为球心的球体之间发生碰撞。可以用于circle picking处理曲面转化均匀网格。
description_en: This causes collisions between spheres centered at a point. It can be used for circle picking to convert curved surfaces into uniform meshes.

parameters.name: Points
parameters.desc_en: List of points at the centres of the spheres to collide

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
